ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Oct-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nazar Ghosseiri appeared by telephone for Brent Thompson (Petitioner).

The Court informed Counsel that it needs the original certified letters from the San Mateo probate, and that verification from the Fiduciary on the amendment that was filed as a supplement on September 20, 2018 is also needed and it should be noticed. Ms. Ghosseiri informed the Court that the letters were filed on August 27, 2018. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Accounting, etc. is continued to October 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice and for verification. The Court will take a look at the letters that were filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition To Close Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Continued To Jun-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nazar Ghosseiri appeared by telephone for Brent Thompson.

Ms. Ghosseiri stated that a petition for final distribution on waiver of account was submitted yesterday and that they were provided with the waiver late Friday. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or report on status of administration is continued to June 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court reminded Counsel to consider the length of time it takes for processing documents when presented for filing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition To Close Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Continued To Jun-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nazar Ghosseiri for Brent Thompson (Administrator)

Ms. Ghosseiri stated that the estate is in a position to be closed, she hoped to have it ready, and she provided an informal accounting to the sole beneficiary who is out of town. The status on filing of petition for final distribution or second petition for approval of report on status of administration is continued to June 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nazar Ghosseiri for Petitioner Brent Thompson.

The Court noted that waivers of notice had been submitted, and asked if there was anyone opposing the petition. Ms. Ghosseiri replied that she was unaware of anyone contesting the petition.
The Court granted the Amended Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary (order signed). Bond was set at $590,000.00. The Court set a Status Hearing re Closing of Estate for April 3, 2017 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Continued To Jun-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Continued To Jun-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nazar Ghosseiri for (petitioner) Brent Thompson.

The Court stated that this is for probate of a lost will, that a copy has been found, that the decedent died 13 years ago, that the proposed administrator is still working on sorting through papers and asked why not wait until he is finished. Ms. Ghossieri reported that the house is in extreme clutter, that they are substantially complete on going through the papers, that the property is on the market for sale and that they do not believe the original will will show up. The Court stated that the declaration indicated the decedent was unlikely to throw anything away. Ms. Ghossieri stated that the spouse just recently died, that during the interim time anything could have happened, that papers are hidden in books and hard to find and that a diligent search has been done. The Court stated that once the search is completed we will work with what we have. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to June 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further evidence regarding finding of the original will.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)
